title: Talking to a Dog
description: Simple Bulgarian commands and encouragement phrases for dogs and pets.

content.title: Basic Commands
content.description: These are short, clear commands you might use with a dog.

content.title: Praise and Reassurance
content.description: Dogs respond well to short, positive phrases.

content.note: A perfect praise word for dogs and people.
A calming cue if the dog is excited.
Useful when giving a treat or toy.

content.title: Tone and Timing
content.description: Short commands work best when the voice is consistent and calm.

content.title: Helpful habits
items: Use the same word every time for the same command.
Praise right after the dog responds correctly.
Use calm words when the dog needs to relax.

content.title: Practical tip
content.text: Bulgarian dog commands are often short and direct, so a clear tone matters as much as the word itself.

content.title: Practice
content.description: A quick reminder to check the most important command words.

content.question: Which word means 'Sit!'?
content.note: A very common first training word.
